displaySubtitle: Tune visuals and audio alerts to your preferences.
displaySectionSubtitle: Adjust how the window renders backgrounds and effects.
displayShowRemainingSub: Display what is left instead of what is used.
displayShowFilePathSub: Display the parent path next to file links in messages.
displaySplitChatDiff: Split chat and diff center panes
displaySplitChatDiffSub: Show chat and diff side by side instead of swapping between them.
displayAutoTitleSub: Generate a short title from your first message (uses extra tokens).
displayChatSectionSub: Control how much conversation history is retained per thread.
displayUnlimitedHistorySub: Keep full thread history in memory (may impact performance).
displayScrollbackHelp: Higher values keep more history but may increase memory usage. Use "Sync from server" on a thread to re-fetch older messages.
displayScrollbackRange: Range: {{min}}–{{max}}. Counts messages, tool calls, and other conversation items.
displayReduceTransparencySub: Use solid surfaces instead of glass.
displayUiFontHelp: Applies to all UI text. Leave empty to use the default system font stack.
displayCodeFontHelp: Applies to git diffs and other mono-spaced readouts.
displayCodeFontSizeHelp: Adjusts code and diff text size.
displayNotificationSoundsSub: Play a sound when a long-running agent finishes while the window is unfocused.
displaySystemNotificationsSub: Show a system notification when a long-running agent finishes while the window is unfocused.
displaySubagentNotificationsSub: Include spawned sub-agent threads in system notifications.

openAgents.title: Open in
openAgents.subtitle: Customize the Open in menu shown in the title bar and file previews.
openAgents.label: Label
openAgents.commandsHelp: Commands receive the selected path as the final argument.
openAgents.appsOpenMac: Apps open via `open -a` with optional args.
openAgents.appsRunExec: Apps run as an executable with optional args.

about.title: About
about.subtitle: App version, build metadata, and update controls.
about.autoCheckSubtitle: When enabled, CodexMonitor checks for new app versions on launch.
about.updatesUnavailable: Updates are unavailable in this runtime.
about.latestVersion: You are on the latest version.

shortcuts.title: Shortcuts
shortcuts.subtitle: Customize keyboard shortcuts for file actions, composer, panels, and navigation.
shortcuts.searchHelp: Filter by section name, action, or default shortcut.
shortcuts.pressNewHelp: Press a new shortcut while focused. Default: {{shortcut}}
shortcuts.groupFileSub: Create agents and worktrees from the keyboard.
shortcuts.groupComposerSub: Cycle between model, access, reasoning, and collaboration modes.

git.title: Git
git.subtitle: Manage how diffs are loaded in the Git sidebar.
git.ignoreWhitespaceSubtitle: Hides whitespace-only changes in local and commit diffs.
git.commitMessageHelp: Used when generating commit messages. Include {{diff}} to insert the git diff.
git.commitMessageModelHelp: The model used when generating commit messages. Leave on default to use the workspace model.

dictation.title: Dictation
dictation.subtitle: Enable microphone dictation with on-device transcription.
dictation.enableSubtitle: Downloads the selected Whisper model on first use.
dictation.langHelp: Auto-detect stays on; this nudges the decoder toward your preference.
dictation.holdKeyHelp: Hold the key to start dictation, release to stop and process.

composer.title: Composer
composer.subtitle: Control helpers and formatting behavior inside the message editor.
composer.followUpHelp: Choose the default while a run is active. Press {{shortcut}} to send the opposite behavior for one message.
composer.followUpHintSubtitle: Displays queue/steer shortcut guidance above the composer.
composer.steerUnavailable: Steer is unavailable in the current Codex config. Follow-ups will queue.
composer.presetsSubtitle: Choose a starting point and fine-tune the toggles below.
composer.presetHelp: Presets update the toggles below. Customize any setting after selecting.
composer.fenceExpandSpaceSubtitle: Typing ``` then Space inserts a fenced block.
composer.fenceExpandEnterSubtitle: Use Enter to expand ``` lines when enabled.
composer.fenceLangTagsSubtitle: Allows ```lang + Space to include a language.
composer.fenceWrapSelectionSubtitle: Wraps selected text when creating a fence.
composer.copyWithoutFencesSubtitle: When enabled, Copy is plain text. Hold {{key}} to include ``` fences.
composer.autoWrapPasteSubtitle: Wraps multi-line paste inside a fenced block.
composer.autoWrapCodeSubtitle: Wraps long single-line code snippets on paste.
composer.listContinuationSubtitle: Continues numbered and bulleted lists when the line has content.
composer.steerTitle: Steer is unavailable in the current Codex config.
composer.steerTooltip: Steer is unavailable in the current Codex config.

environments.title: Environments
environments.subtitle: Configure per-project setup scripts and worktree locations.
environments.globalRootHelp: Default location for new worktrees when a project does not override it. Each project gets its own subfolder under this root.
environments.setupScriptHelp: Runs once in a dedicated terminal after each new worktree is created.
environments.worktreesFolderHelp: Custom location for this project's worktrees. Leave empty to use the global root or the built-in default.
environments.copyClipboardUnavailable: Clipboard access is unavailable in this environment. Copy the script manually instead.
environments.copyClipboardWriteError: Could not write to the clipboard. Copy the script manually instead.

agents.title: Agents
agents.subtitle: Configure multi-agent mode, limits, and custom agent roles.
agents.builtinsHelp: Built-in roles from Codex are still available: <1>default</1>, <3>explorer</3>, and <5>worker</5>.
agents.maxThreadsSubtitle: Maximum open agent threads. Valid range: <2>1-12</2>. Changes save immediately.
agents.maxDepthSubtitle: Maximum nested spawn depth. Valid range: <2>1-4</2>. Changes save immediately.
agents.createAgentSubtitle: Add a custom role under <2>[agents.<name>]</2> and create its config file.
agents.name: Name
agents.generateTitle: Generate description and developer instructions with AI
agents.loadingModels: Loading workspace model metadata. Using fallback model defaults for now.
agents.fallbackModels: Using fallback model defaults until workspace model metadata is available.
agents.configuredAgentsSubtitle: Manage custom roles and their per-agent config files.
agents.deleteConfirm: Delete agent and managed config file?
agents.renameCheckbox: Rename managed config file when agent name changes
agents.maxThreadsError: Max threads must be an integer between {{min}} and {{max}}.
agents.maxDepthError: Max depth must be an integer between {{min}} and {{max}}.
agents.unableToUpdateCore: Unable to update agents core settings.
agents.unableToReadConfig: Unable to read agent config file.
agents.unableToWriteConfig: Unable to write agent config file.
agents.generateNoWorkspace: Add a workspace before generating agent configuration.
agents.generateSeed: Create a practical custom coding agent configuration.

projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: Group related workspaces and reorder projects within each group.
projects.groupsSubtitle: Create group labels for related repositories.
projects.projectsSubtitle: Assign projects to groups and adjust their order.

server.title: Server
server.subtitleDesktop: Configure how CodexMonitor exposes TCP backend access for mobile and remote clients. Desktop usage remains local unless you explicitly connect through remote mode.
server.subtitleMobile: Configure TCP host/token from your desktop setup, then run a connection test.
server.backendModeHelp: Local keeps desktop requests in-process. Remote routes desktop requests through the same TCP transport path used by mobile clients.
server.keepDaemonTitle: Keep daemon running after app closes
server.keepDaemonSubtitle: If disabled, CodexMonitor stops managed TCP daemon processes before exit.
server.remoteSwitchHelp: Switch the active remote here. The fields below edit the active entry.
server.mobileHostInfo: Use the Tailscale host from your desktop CodexMonitor app (Server section), for example `macbook.your-tailnet.ts.net:4732`.
server.desktopHostInfo: This host/token is used by mobile clients and desktop remote-mode testing.
server.mobileTestRetry: Make sure your desktop app daemon is running and reachable on Tailscale, then retry this test.
server.daemonHelp: Start this daemon before connecting from iOS. It uses your current token and listens on <2>0.0.0.0:<port></2>, matching your configured host port.
server.installTailscaleInfo: Install Tailscale on both desktop and iOS to continue.
server.commandTemplate: Command template (manual fallback) for starting the daemon:
server.tokenEmpty: Remote backend token is empty. Set one before exposing daemon access.
server.footerDesktop: Mobile access should stay scoped to your own infrastructure (tailnet). CodexMonitor does not provide hosted backend services.
server.footerMobile: Use your own infrastructure only. On iOS, get the Tailscale hostname and token from your desktop CodexMonitor setup.
server.deleteRemoteMessage: Remove <2>{{name}}</2> from saved remotes? This only removes the profile from this device.
server.mobileDaemonError: Mobile daemon is in an error state.
server.addedConnected: Added "{{name}}" and connected. {{count}} {{word}} reachable on the remote backend.
server.connectedRemote: Connected. {{count}} {{word}} reachable on the remote backend.
server.unableToConnectNew: Unable to connect to the new remote backend.
server.unableToConnectRemote: Unable to connect to remote backend.
server.unableToBuildTailscale: Unable to build Tailscale daemon command.
server.unableToUpdateDaemon: Unable to update mobile access daemon status.
server.needsOneRemote: You need at least one remote.

features.title: Features
features.subtitle: Manage stable and experimental Codex features.
features.personalityHelp: Choose Codex communication style (writes top-level <3>personality</3> in config.toml).
features.pauseTitle: Pause queued messages when a response is required
features.pauseSubtitle: Keep queued messages paused while Codex is waiting for plan accept/changes or your answers.
features.noStableFlags: No stable feature flags returned by Codex.
features.noExperimentalFlags: No preview or under-development feature flags returned by Codex.
features.connectForFlags: Connect a workspace to load Codex feature flags.
features.featureRemoved: Legacy feature flag kept for backward compatibility.
features.unableToLoadFlags: Unable to load Codex feature flags.
features.descUndo: Create a ghost commit at each turn.
features.descUnifiedExec: Use the single unified PTY-backed exec tool.
features.descJsRepl: Enable JavaScript REPL tools backed by a persistent Node kernel.
features.descJsReplToolsOnly: Only expose js_repl tools directly to the model.
features.descSearchTool: Removed legacy search flag kept for backward compatibility.
features.descRuntimeMetrics: Enable runtime metrics snapshots via a manual reader.
features.descSqlite: Persist rollout metadata to a local SQLite database.
features.descMemoryTool: Enable startup memory extraction and memory consolidation.
features.descChildAgentsMd: Append additional AGENTS.md guidance to user instructions.
features.descUseLinuxSandboxBwrap: Use the bubblewrap-based Linux sandbox pipeline.
features.descRequestRule: Allow approval requests and exec rule proposals.
features.descExperimentalWindowsSandbox: Removed Windows sandbox flag kept for backward compatibility.
features.descElevatedWindowsSandbox: Removed elevated Windows sandbox flag kept for backward compatibility.
features.descEnableRequestCompression: Compress streaming request bodies sent to codex-backend.
features.descAppsMcpGateway: Route Apps MCP calls through the configured gateway.
features.descSkillMcpDependencyInstall: Allow prompting and installing missing MCP dependencies.
features.descSkillEnvVarDependencyPrompt: Prompt for missing skill environment variable dependencies.
features.descSteer: Enable turn steering capability when supported by Codex.
features.descResponsesWebsockets: Use Responses API WebSocket transport for OpenAI by default.
features.descResponsesWebsocketsV2: Enable Responses API WebSocket v2 mode.
features.descBrowserUseExternal: Use an external browser for automation.
features.descFastMode: Enable fast mode to skip non-critical steps.
features.descGuardianApproval: Require guardian approval for critical operations.
features.descInAppBrowser: Open a browser within the app.
features.descToolCallMcpElicitation: Elicit tool calls from the model via MCP.
features.descToolSuggest: Suggest available tools based on context.
features.descUnavailableDummyTools: Show placeholder entries for unavailable tools.
features.descDefaultModeRequestUserInput: Request user input in default mode.
features.descExternalMigration: Show a startup prompt when Codex detects migratable external agent config for this machine or project.
features.descGoals: Set a persistent goal Codex can continue over time.
features.descMemories: Allow Codex to create new memories from conversations and bring relevant memories into new conversations.
features.descPreventSleepWhileRunning: Keep your computer awake while Codex is running a thread.
features.descResponsesWebsocketResponseProcessed: Notify when a WebSocket response has been processed.
features.descTerminalResizeReflow: Rebuild Codex-owned transcript scrollback when the terminal width changes.
features.descToolSearchAlwaysDeferMcpTools: Tool search always defers MCP tools.
features.descWorkspaceOwnerUsageNudge: Nudge when workspace owner usage is anomalous.
features.titleToolSearchAlwaysDeferMcpTools: Tool Search Always Defer Mcp Tools

codex.title: Codex
codex.subtitle: Configure the Codex CLI used by CodexMonitor and validate the install.
codex.defaultPathHelp: Leave empty to use the system PATH resolution.
codex.extraFlagsHelp: Extra flags passed before <3>app-server</3>. Use quotes for values with spaces.
codex.sharedServerHelp: These settings apply to the shared Codex app-server used across all connected workspaces.
codex.overrideHelp: Per-thread override processing ignores unsupported flags: <2>-m</2>/<4>--model</4>, <6>-a</6>/<8>--ask-for-approval</8>, <10>-s</10>/<12>--sandbox</12>, <14>--full-auto</14>, <16>--dangerously-bypass-approvals-and-sandbox</16>, <18>--oss</18>, <20>--local-provider</20>, and <22>--no-alt-screen</22>.
codex.modelHelpNoWorkspace: Add a workspace to load available models.
codex.modelHelpLoading: Loading models from the first workspace...
codex.modelHelpDefault: Sourced from the first workspace and used when there is no thread-specific override.
codex.effortHelpSupported: Available options depend on the selected model.
codex.effortHelpUnsupported: The selected model does not expose reasoning effort options.
codex.accessModeHelp: Used when there is no thread-specific override.
codex.reviewHelp: Choose whether <2>/review</2> runs in the current thread or a detached review thread.
codex.globalAgentsPlaceholder: Add global instructions for Codex agents…
codex.updatesUnavailable: Codex updates are not available in this build.

deleteGroupDetail: Workspaces in this group will be moved to "{{ungroupedLabel}}".
